name: Nut-Topped Toffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and brown sugar in a saucepan over low heat until combined.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the milk chocolate until smooth.
3. Pour mixture into a greased baking dish.
4. Sprinkle hazelnut pieces evenly over the top of the toffee.
5. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
